subject: Weekly digest: launch track in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-6109
body: Please note the launch stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-6109. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
